findings.summary: missing_mpn over-reports: components with LCSC part numbers flagged as missing MPN; Q1 (MMDT3904 dual NPN BJT, ESP32 auto-reset circuit) absent from transistor_circuits; I2C bus detection correct: ...

correct.description: Both I2C bus entries correctly list all sensor ICs and correctly identify pull-up resistors tied to VCC. Voltage divider for VBUS sensing (R10/R11→U2 VBUS pin) and battery voltage divider (R4/R21→U1 IO35) are also correctly identified.

incorrect.description: C2 (lcsc: C15525), C3/C4/C7/C11/C12/C13/C14/C16/C5 (lcsc: C1525), D1 (lcsc: C2297), R5/R9/R12/R13/R17 (lcsc: C11702), R2/R3/R18/R19/R20 (lcsc: C25900) all have LCSC codes but appear in statistics.missing_mpn because the check at line 1125 only tests c['mpn'], ignoring lcsc/digikey/mouser fields. For Chinese-market designs that use LCSC exclusively, this produces a systematically inflated missing_mpn list.

missed.description: Q1 is a standard CP2102→ESP32 auto-reset circuit (dual NPN in SOT-363). Q2/Q3/Q4 (all MOSFETs) appear in transistor_circuits but Q1 does not, suggesting BJT detection in transistor_circuits is incomplete or the dual-unit symbol (units 1 & 2 both reference Q1) causes the BJT to be skipped by the circuit detector.

findings.summary: copper_layers_used=2 correctly reported despite 4-layer stackup definition

correct.description: Board defines a 4-layer stackup (F.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, B.Cu) but no tracks or zones are placed on In1.Cu or In2.Cu. Reporting copper_layers_used=2 is accurate. Layer list includes all 4 copper layers as defined. Board dimensions 83x50mm, 69 footprints, 192 vias, fully routed — all look correct.
